# UI Feature Agent

## Purpose
Automate the addition or update of Lit components, routes, and styles for new features in the Heroic Adventures App.

## Scope of Tasks
- Add or update Lit components in `src/client/`.
- Register new components in relevant pages.
- Update shared styles as needed.
- Add or update usage documentation.

## Required Skills
- add-lit-component
- add-shared-utility

## Workflow/Steps
1. Plan the UI feature and identify required components.
2. Implement new or updated components following project conventions.
3. Register components and update routes/pages.
4. Update or add documentation and usage examples.
5. Validate UI changes locally.
